```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## loading libraries 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
acs <- read.csv("data/2000_acs_sample.csv")
head(acs)
```

```{r}
glimpse(acs)
summary(acs)
```

```{r}
nrow(acs)
ncol(acs)
colnames(acs)
````

```{r}
acs |> 
  pull(year) |> 
  unique() |> 
  length()
```

```{r}
acs <- 
  acs |> 
  rename(person = pernum,
         household = serial)
```

```{r}
acs <- 
  acs |> 
  rename_with(\(x) str_remove(x, "us2000c_"))
```

```{r}
acs <- 
  acs |> 
  mutate(age_months = age * 12)

```

```{r}
acs <- 
  acs |> 
  mutate(teenager = age >= 13 & age <= 19)
```

```{r}
acs <- 
  acs |> 
  mutate(id = paste(household, person, sep = "_"))
```

```{r}
acs <- 
  acs |> 
  mutate(date = paste0(year, "0101") |> ymd())
```

```{r}
acs <- 
  acs |> 
  mutate(female = ifelse(sex == 2, 1, 0))
```
